one_line_summary: Clean subcommand wiring with strict phase enforcement, strong ADR, thorough tests, and coherent docs; tests not runnable in agent's env.
strengths: ADR lays out contract, alternatives, and six phases clearly before implementation
Dedicated DoubleAgentTDDSession with injectable agent/test runners and end-to-end plus RED-not-failing tests
README, wiki page, sidebar, and slash-help all updated coherently with the CLI UX
weaknesses: Refactor 'applied' check is only prompt-context based; no file/patch assertion
Reuses run_agent but doesn't leverage Engine/PlanMode/SwarmTool directly
Did not actually execute pytest to verify green; relied on compileall
